install: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && curl -fsSL https://ntn.dev -o /tmp/install-ntn.sh && NTN_INSTALL_DIR="$(dirname "$(command -v npm)")" bash /tmp/install-ntn.sh && npx --yes skills add makenotion/skills --skill notion-cli --global --agent cursor --yes && NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX="$(dirname "$(dirname "$(command -v npm)")")" npm i -g vercel
